wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation|2}}{{Character Infobox|Ironclad2}} {{StS2|Ironclad}} is one of five characters in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]], and the only one available when you first start the game. He starts with 80 Max HP, the highest of any character. At {{Asc|2|Ascension|2}} and above he starts with 64 HP. == Starting Loadout == === Starting Relic === {{R|Burning Blood||2}} - Heal for 6 HP at the end of combat. Can be replaced by {{R|Black Blood||2}}. === Starting Deck === These {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad&rarity:Basic|Cards|2}} cannot be obtained through regular card rewards. * {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strike|2}} x5 * {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defend|2}} x4 * {{C|Bash||2}} x1 === Ironclad Cards === There are a total of 82 regular cards in Ironclads's card pool. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Ironclad_Skill_Common.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad&rarity:Common|Common Cards|2}} x20 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Ironclad_Skill_Uncommon.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad&rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon Cards|2}} x36 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Ironclad_Skill_Rare.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad&rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}} x26 When playing {{2|Multiplayer}}, these cards get added to the card pool: * {{C|Demonic Shield||2}} * {{C|Tank||2}} There are also five cards that are not obtainable through normal means. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Ironclad_Skill_Ancient.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad&rarity:Ancient|Ancient Cards|2}} x2 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Ironclad_Skill_Event.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad&rarity:Event|Event Cards|2}} x3
A full list of Ironclad Cards (and more) can be found {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Ironclad|here|2}}. == Unique Relics == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Relic |- |'''Common''' |{{R|Red Skull||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{R|Paper Phrog||2}}, {{R|Self-Forming Clay||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{R|Charon's Ashes||2}}, {{R|Demon Tongue||2}}, {{R|Ruined Helmet||2}} |- |'''Shop''' |{{R|Brimstone||2}} |} == Unique Potions == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Potion |- |'''Common''' |{{P|Blood Potion||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{P|Ashwater||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{P|Soldier's Stew||2}} |} == Unlocks == The Ironclad is unlocked from the start of the game. Like all characters, there are 6 Epochs in the [[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline|Timeline]] which are discovered upon reaching certain Ironclad gameplay milestones, unlocking Cards, Relics, and Potions unique to the Ironclad. {| class="wikitable" |+ ![[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline#The Ironclad|Epoch]]
(Unlock Requirement) !Rewards |- |{{2|Timeline#The Ironclad - Chapter 3|The Ironclad}}
(Beating Act 1) |{{C|Molten Fist||2}}, {{C|Dominate||2}}, {{C|Cruelty||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Devastation|Devastation}}
(Beating Act 2) |{{R|Red Skull||2}}, {{R|Paper Phrog||2}}, {{R|Ruined Helmet||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#The Pact|The Pact}}
(Beating Act 3) |{{P|Blood Potion||2}}, {{P|Ashwater||2}}, {{P|Soldier's Stew||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#My Face|My Face}}
(Beating {{Asc|1|Ascension|2}}) |{{C|Blood Wall||2}}, {{C|Inferno||2}}, {{C|Tear Asunder||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Ablaze|Ablaze}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Elites|Elites]]) |{{C|Cinder||2}}, {{C|Drum of Battle||2}}, {{C|Pact's End||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Snuffed|Snuffed}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Bosses|Bosses]]) |{{R|Self-Forming Clay||2}}, {{R|Charon's Ashes||2}}, {{R|Demon Tongue||2}} |} Additionally, completing a single run with the Ironclad, even if the run ends with a loss, will unlock the {{KW|Silent||2}} as a playable character. ==Gallery== File:StS2_Ironclad_Rest_Anim.webp|Rest Animation File:StS2_Ironclad_Idle_Anim.webp|Idle Animation File:StS2_Ironclad_Banner_Anim.webp|Character Banner [[Category:Character]][[Category:Slay_the_Spire_2_Content]]
